subcodes.first_line: O thou son of him whom God hath loved and cherished! Say thou with beauty: the test of 'Abdu'l-Bahá is not thus beautiful and befitting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابن من احبه الله و احبه بزیبا بگواید امتحان عبدالبهاء زیبا و سزاوار نه چنان
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision
